headline: Is Regency Centers (REG) Offering Value After Recent Gains In Retail REIT Sentiment?
summary: Wondering if Regency Centers at around US$77.86 is offering solid value or if most of the upside is already reflected in the price? This breakdown is designed to help you make sense of where it stands today. The stock has returned 2.3% over the last week and 14.6% year to date, with a 16.4% return over the past year and a longer term picture that includes 46.6% over 3 years and 63.5% over 5 years. Over the last 30 days it has shown a modest 0.5% decline. Recent news around Regency Centers...
